task: Use the object to mix the contents in the bowl
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A green bowl with a yellow object inside sits on a white countertop. The bowl is rigid with a rim; the yellow object is small and round. STRATEGY - grasp the bowl at its rim for stable hold, rotate it to mix contents, release. Failure modes: slipping during rotation, incomplete mixing. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bowl rim; Step 2 grasp rim for secure hold; Step 3 rotate bowl; Step 4 release.**
Goal: mixed_contents(green_bowl)
Scene: green_bowl, yellow_object, countertop
Step 1: reach(green_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the green bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the green bowl
  contact: holding(green_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_bowl)
Step 3: rotate(green_bowl)
  affordance_region: the body of the green bowl
  contact: holding(green_bowl) [progress]
  spatial: rotated(green_bowl, 180) [completion]
  direction: rotate_axis(0, 0, 180) [progress]
  done_when: rotated(green_bowl, 180)
Step 4: release(green_bowl)
  affordance_region: the countertop
  contact: released(green_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: released(green_bowl) AND stable(green_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the green bowl
the rim of the green bowl
the body of the green bowl
